# Agicap

Positioning: Liquidity management tool
Targets: MEs, SMEs, Tax advisors
USP: Visual interface for cash management, scenarios and multi-bank account consolidation, quick start-up for European SMEs.
Website: https://www.agicap.com/

# Features put forward

- **Reliable decisions based on precise data**
- **Optimizing your cash performance**
- **Automated processes and seamless collaboration in one central location**

## Connections

### Banks

Agicap is connected with thousands of banks in Europe and beyond.
The balances of your various bank accounts and all deposits and withdrawals are synchronized in real time to provide you with up-to-date and reliable cash flow information.

All your past transactions are also imported and automatically categorized. This provides you with complete information on cash flow performance and KPIs, simplifying monitoring and reporting.

### ERP

Agicap integrates with your accounting and ERP tools to automate your cash management

Your quotes, orders and invoices are automatically fed into Agicap to ensure reliable cash flow forecasting and real-time monitoring.

[Check Icon](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[Check Icon](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Your overdue customer invoices are centralized to enable a structured and automated debt collection process for late payments.

## Cash Management

### **Automated Payment Matching**

Our AI automatically matches your bank transactions to invoices – for greater efficiency and less effort

### **Daily Liquidity Tracking**

Keep track of your cash position, forecasts, credit lines, investments, and invoices in real time at all times – for full control without unpleasant surprises

### **Account and payment reconciliation**

Make your payments effortless – thanks to automated cash pooling, netting, interest calculations and pre-bookings.

### **Automated accounting entries**

Your bank transactions are automatically recorded so that your financial records are always up to date – efficiently, accurately and with minimal effort

## Liquidity forecasts

### **The most comprehensive cash forecasting on the market.**

Generate accurate liquidity forecasts based on your budget, your business and financial figures, and your past results.

### **Automatic generation of accurate forecasts**

Optimize your forecasts in real time with the Agicap modules: cash flows from financing activities, intra-group cash flows, accounts payable and accounts receivable management.

### **Flexible planning across multiple liquidity periods**

Create and monitor your forecasts on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis. Model your cash flows in dedicated modules tailored to different planning horizons: 13-week, quarterly, and annual planning.

### **Scenario Planning**

Create scenarios that visualize the impact of your decisions on your treasury and other key performance indicators. Integrate multiple scenarios to gain deeper insights into the potential impact on your business

## Debt management

### **Your central source of information for debt management**

Centralize all your debt in any currency – including bank and intercompany debt, leases, and lines of credit. Agicap automates repayment plans and calculates interest instantly, giving you complete transparency over financing and its impact on your cash flow.

### **Net Financial Position**

Monitor your net financial position and covenants in real time, with always up-to-date, shareable automatic exports for your stakeholders

### **Intercompany Loans**

Automatically detect and reconcile intercompany transactions, eliminate spreadsheet clutter, and accelerate your preliminary accounting

### **Accurate Debt Forecasting**

Instantly generate forecasts of financing flows, interest payments, intercompany transactions, and cash movements for smarter, faster financial decisions

## Invoice management

### **Immediate overview of the impact of receivables financing on your treasury**

[Check Icon](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Everything in one central location: Consolidate all your factoring and invoice financing contracts and say goodbye to scattered spreadsheets for good.

[Check Icon](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Save time & avoid mistakes: Customer invoices are automatically assigned to the appropriate financing solution.

[Check Icon](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Always keep an eye on liquidity: Payments are automatically calculated for lenders and customers, so you always have an overview of incoming cash.

## Investment management

### **Monitoring Available Liquidity**

Manage your excess cash reserves and identify which amounts you can invest without jeopardizing ongoing business operations

### **Investment Simulations**

Increase your returns by simulating investment scenarios for different time periods. Make informed resource allocation decisions that support your organization's growth

### **Ongoing Investment Tracking**

Keep track of your investment performance with a central overview of invested amounts, accrued and projected interest, maturities, and interest rates.

## Reporting and analysis

### **Custom Dashboards**

Easily create your financial and business reports and have them updated automatically. Access them anytime via your desktop or the Agicap mobile app

### **Deviation analysis compared to actual values**

Create reliable forecasts and gain detailed insights into deviations at the group, subsidiary, or category level.

### **Consolidation and Multi-Entity Companies**

Keep track of group-wide cash flow at all times and ensure full transparency across each individual company

### **Fast Excel and PDF exports**

Easily share your reports with stakeholders for efficient collaboration.

# Business model

- Work units (asked to obtain a pricing):
    - Number of bank account to connect
    - Annual revenue---
